infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Old Time uses your microphone for voice notes and calls.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Old Time uses your camera to share photos, video, and your status.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Old Time uses your photo library to share images in chats.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Old Time uses your contacts to find friends already on Old Time.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Old Time uses your location to share live location in a chat.
